Video.summary: In the quarter finals, Belgian Moroccan Anis Bouzid (48-4, 37 KO) takes on kickboxing legend Errol Zimmerman (112-20-1, 45 KO), Serbian sensation Milos Cvjeticanin (17-5, 10 KO) meets number one French heavyweight Sofian Laidouni (42-5-1, 20 KO), monstrous Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (29-4-1, 16 KO) clashes with ‘The Soldier’ Nidal Bchiri (20-5-1, 5 KO), and ‘The Black Ghost’ Mory Kromah (35-3-1, 21 KO) collides with outspoken rival Michael ‘Timebomb’ Boapeah (23-5-1, 29 KO). Only one fighter can come out on top and walk away as the new ‘King of Kickboxing’. Elsewhere, the always exciting Bahram Rajabzadeh (72-6, 64 KO) goes up against ‘The Gladiator’ Cristian Ristea (44-27, 13 KO), Hamicha (42-2, 31 KO) puts his undefeated GLORY record on the line against late replacement Brice Kombou (20-6, 5 KO), and featherweights Andre Santos (23-2, 10 KO) and Deniz Demirkapu (15-5, 10 KO) will kick-off the main card.
Video.title: GLORY 105: Last Heavyweight Standing Finals

Video.summary: Former Light Heavyweight Champion Tarik Khbabez (52-12-1, 22 KO) and Bahram Rajabzabeh (72-5, 63 KO) collide in a huge showdown for the vacant Light Heavyweight title. The penultimate round of the Last Heavyweight Standing tournament resumes with eight heavyweights competing in two separate four-man one-night tournaments. Notable participants include Levi Rigters (20-3, 10 KO), Nabil Khachab (30-6-1, 4 KO), Rade Opacic (22-7, 17 KO) and Milos Cvjeticanin (14-4, 9 KO).
Video.title: GLORY 104 Rotterdam

Video.summary: GLORY featherweight world champion Petch (175-40-3, 27 KO) will rematch KO artist Abraham Vidales (18-4, 14 KO) and Portuguese sensation Miguel Trindade (64-8, 26 KO) will look to avenge his 2023 loss to the always entertaining Berjan Peposhi (32-6, 16 KO). Former GLORY title contender & leading Japanese fighter Kento Haraguchi (28-6-1, 18 KO) will go up against talented newcomer Hiroki Kasahara (39-8, 17 KO) while popular South Korean veteran Sung-hyun Lee (71-13-2, 17 KO) takes on top young prospect Yura Kono (17-1, 9 KO). In addition, the seven-fight card will be headlined by Shiro Matsumoto (55-17-4, 19 KO) defending his RISE bantamweight title against Koki Osaki (38-6-1, 21 KO). In the co-main event, budding superstar Ryujin Nasukawa (17-2, 8 KO) and heavy-hitter Kaito Hasegawa (17-2, 13 KO) battle for the vacant RISE super flyweight championship.
Video.title: GLORY 106: Last FW Standing Quarter Finals

Image.alt: GLORY 106: Last FW Standing Quarter Finals
GLORY 106: Last FW Standing Quarter Finals
GLORY 106: Last FW Standing Quarter Finals
